name: Seth Jansen || Cruel Boss
description:
It's not Christmas 'til somebody cries.
Your asshole boss is demanding you work late on Christmas Eve

Day 11: On the eleventh day of Christmas, m00nprincess gave to me a nightmare boss to be stuck with on Christmas Eve.

Working at Mebook should be glamorous, right?

You get to work at the hottest tech start up, for the man they call a visionary---

It's perfect.

Except for the long hours, ridiculously high standards and verbal abuse from that so-called visionary.

And now?

He's demanding you work late---

On Christmas eve.

♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡



We're almost two weeks in!

I hope you've been enjoying the bots so far.

Seth here is another absolute jerk, and I had a lot of fun writing him. Please make his life hell!


Or romance him, you do you, cuties♡

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡

This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI service. Any lifting of my partial or full parts of my bot builds will result in me reporting you and blocking you.
creator: m00nprincess
